initial_req: I need an instant messaging application for real-time communication between users.
I need an instant messaging application for real-time communication between users.

history.question: Will users communicate only in one-on-one conversations, or do you need group chat functionality as well? Also, what types of messages should be supported beyond text (e.g., images, files, voice messages)?
history.answer: I expect to add friends and create groups to connect with other users. Additionally, I expect to send text, images, videos, and files to share various forms of content.
